failure_notes: M1_MISSING_SUBCAT: Subject met exclusion criteria 14 [Known active infection including SARS-CoV-2 infection, HBV, HCV, and HIV or AIDS-related illness]

M1_HALLUCINATED: Subject did not meet inclusion criteria 5 [Documented HER2(-) tumor on the most recent tumor biopsy.]

M1_HALLUCINATED: Subject did not meet inclusion criteria 7 [Provide a blood sample and a tumor sample collected at diagnosis.]
